requirements.description: Canonical operating cash-flow definitions (NOI = Credits BUYER_RECEIPT - Debits SUPPLIER_PAYMENT + SALARY; Debt Service = DEBT_SERVICE; no average credits as NOI; no inferred obligations as credits/DSCR)
requirements.notes: Currently calculate_dscr_sandbox_v1 implements basic NOI/Debt Service, but SafeLimitEngine in engine.py uses average credits/debits approximations and requires canonicalization across all limit calculations.

requirements.description: Correct current DSCR calculation across trailing periods without approximation or fabricated fallback ratios
requirements.notes: Current DSCR is calculated from seeded transaction dates, but needs strict rejection of fabricated fallback ratios when debt service is zero or missing.

requirements.description: Correct post-loan DSCR calculation incorporating proposed facility EMI into debt service
requirements.notes: Fully implemented in SafeLimitEngine.calculate_emi_from_loan and calculate_post_loan_dscr, returned directly in DecisionPolicy.evaluate() and DecisionPackageResponse.

requirements.description: Reducing-balance amortization exact formula for EMI and debt service projections
requirements.notes: Fully implemented exact formula P * r * (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1) in SafeLimitEngine and called across policy and limit engines.

requirements.description: Explicit unknown-state semantics (UNKNOWN / INSUFFICIENT_DATA when missing reporting periods or zero debt service instead of fabricated numbers)
requirements.notes: Engine returns `None` or `'UNKNOWN'` in some receivable/GST metrics, but formal explicit typing and enforcement across all capacity outputs is needed.

requirements.description: Product-specific structure selection for Working Capital Line, Receivables Finance, and Term Loan with exact policy constraints
requirements.notes: SafeLimitEngine currently uses simplified heuristic multipliers (`0.20` of turnover, `0.50` of FCF). Needs strict product-specific structuring.

requirements.description: Evidence-linked calculation lineage mapping calculated limits directly to underlying evidence IDs
requirements.notes: Limit calculations currently return empty `evidence_ids: []`. Must populate authoritative transaction, GST, and invoice record IDs.

requirements.description: Evidence Sufficiency Passport (dedicated institutional model evaluating freshness, depth, rail coverage, and decisionability)
requirements.notes: Fully implemented in app/domain/evidence/passport.py and exposed via /api/cases/{case_id}/evidence-passport and embedded in decision-package.

requirements.description: Freshness and depth assessment (evaluating trailing month continuity across GST, Account Aggregator, EPFO, and CIBIL)
requirements.notes: Implemented exponential freshness decay (decay_score = 100 * e^(-0.015*t)) and multi-rail depth scoring inside EvidencePassport.

requirements.description: Contradiction and reconciliation handling (GST declared revenue vs Account Aggregator bank inflows contradiction severity grading)
requirements.notes: Reconciliation ratio exists (`UNDER_REPORTED_BANK`, `OVER_REPORTED_BANK`), but needs formal contradiction severity grading and policy blocking gates.

requirements.description: Consent scope and expiry enforcement (strict block when consent is expired, revoked, or insufficient scope)
requirements.notes: Policy checks `consent_status != 'VALID'` and blocks processing (`BLOCK_PROCESSING`). Will verify integration with passport.

requirements.description: Obligation verification state (asserting CIBIL obligations versus observed DEBT_SERVICE bank debits)
requirements.notes: Needs explicit obligation verification state matching reported CIBIL EMI against observed DEBT_SERVICE outflow.

requirements.description: Backend-computed single-factor stress tests (Revenue drop -15%, Interest rate hike +200bps, COGS increase +10%)
requirements.notes: Implemented single-factor stress tests in backend/app/domain/stress/engine.py and exposed via /api/cases/{case_id}/stress-lab.

requirements.description: Backend-computed combined downside stress test (simultaneous revenue drop and interest/cost increase)
requirements.notes: Implemented combined downside stress scenario in backend/app/domain/stress/engine.py.

requirements.description: Stress decision-transition explanation (explaining exactly why a case transitions from CONDITIONAL_OFFER to DECLINE under stress)
requirements.notes: Implemented stress decision-transition explanation in stress engine.

requirements.description: Deterministic 30/60/90-day Bankability Path (concrete milestones for declined/conditional MSMEs based on exact gaps)
requirements.notes: Implemented 30/60/90-day Bankability Path in backend/app/domain/bankability/path.py and exposed via /api/cases/{case_id}/bankability-path.

requirements.description: Same-engine simulated intervention impact (recalculating supportable amount and DSCR when 30/60/90-day actions are completed)
requirements.notes: Implemented simulated intervention impact recalculating supportable amount and DSCR.

requirements.description: Maker-checker workflow (Credit Analyst recommendation separation from Sanctioning Authority final approval/decline)
requirements.notes: Fully verified via E2E release gate and decision assurance proof.

requirements.description: BOLA enforcement (preventing cross-branch and cross-role unauthorized case mutations)
requirements.notes: Verified in test suite and 403 response checks.

requirements.description: CAS stale-version protection (Compare-And-Swap version check preventing concurrent calculation overrides)
requirements.notes: Verified via `STALE_VERSION` (409 Conflict) assertions in test suite.

requirements.description: Idempotency protection (Idempotency-Key header processing preventing duplicate evaluations and mutations)
requirements.notes: Deterministic replay verified in backend test suite.

requirements.description: Sanction-mandate enforcement (enforcing Sanctioning Authority financial exposure limit thresholds)
requirements.notes: Verified (`OUTSIDE_SANCTION_MANDATE` 403 on above-mandate vs 200 on within-mandate).

requirements.description: System Administrator borrower-data isolation (preventing SYSTEM_ADMIN from accessing borrower financial metrics)
requirements.notes: Verified in E2E release gate and backend tests.

requirements.description: Tamper-evident audit-chain verification (SHA-256 cryptographic chaining across all case lifecycle events)
requirements.notes: Verified via `run_decision_assurance.py` continuous chain validation.

requirements.description: Executable Judge Proof Mode (interactive live execution of validation assertions right in the UI without static/disabled buttons)
requirements.notes: Currently `/api/demo/validations` returns hard-coded totals, and `DecisionPackageTab.tsx` has a disabled `Simulate Replay` button.

requirements.description: No hard-coded proof totals (all validation totals derived from actual live execution of database checks/assertions)
requirements.notes: Currently `/api/demo/validations` returns `{"passed": 12, "total": 12, ...}` as static literals. Must run real live assertions against the test database.

requirements.description: Complete Decision Package persisted payload (embedding full audit, calculations, evidence references, conditions, and covenants)
requirements.notes: Decision package exists but lacks full persisted evidence passport, stress outcomes, peer context, and bankability path integration.

requirements.description: Printable committee-ready credit paper (clean print stylesheet and printable view directly generated from authoritative backend payload)
requirements.notes: Implemented clean @media print committee credit paper appraisal view and Print Committee Paper button inside DecisionPackageTab.tsx.

requirements.description: Typed Pydantic <-> TypeScript contracts (strict synchronization between backend Pydantic models and frontend TypeScript interfaces)
requirements.notes: Types need to be expanded to include Evidence Passport, Stress Lab, Bankability Path, Peer Context, and Assessment Certainty.

requirements.description: Single version registry (one canonical version registry file dictating policy, calculation, schema, and proof versions across the whole app)
requirements.notes: Implemented canonical version registry in backend/app/core/versions.py imported across policy, calculations, and endpoints.

requirements.description: Unified institutional design system (semantic colors only, no legacy dark cards, WCAG AA contrast, consistent tokens)
requirements.notes: Most UI uses `bg-white/5` and `bg-black/20`, but needs thorough audit across every tab and removal of all placeholder/static controls.

requirements.description: Real search/command function or removal (no visible search input or command palette that does nothing)
requirements.notes: Ensure every visible filter/search bar actually filters real data or is cleanly removed.

requirements.description: Responsive evaluator journey (complete mobile and 1366x768 usability without horizontal clipping or overflow)
requirements.notes: Layout has flex-wrap and horizontal scrolling tables where appropriate, verified.

requirements.description: Secure public-demo mode (requiring HTTPS, secure cookies, rejecting wildcard/localhost origins in prod, retaining CSRF/rate limits)
requirements.notes: Needs explicit `public_demo` environment configuration enforcing secure cookies and rejecting non-whitelisted CORS.

requirements.description: Login throttling and security events (tracking and logging failed demo login attempts or unauthorized mutations)
requirements.notes: Needs explicit audit logging on failed access attempts.

requirements.description: Readiness endpoint (GET /ready verifying database connection, schema compatibility, version registry, and persona seeding)
requirements.notes: Implemented GET /ready verifying database connection and schema compatibility in backend/app/main.py.

requirements.description: Non-root production containers (Dockerfile non-root user enforcement)
requirements.notes: Must verify `USER appuser` or equivalent in `backend/Dockerfile`.

requirements.description: Valid frontend Vercel configuration (frontend/vercel.json conforming to schema, next.config.mjs proxying /api to BACKEND_URL)
requirements.notes: Created frontend/vercel.json and next.config.mjs with secure proxy and strict headers.

requirements.description: Valid backend cloud configuration (render.yaml, railway.toml or equivalent validated deployment manifest)
requirements.notes: Created render.yaml with backend/render_build.sh build command and railway.toml with NIXPACKS build/seed configuration.

requirements.description: Public HTTPS deployment (live verification of Vercel frontend + managed PostgreSQL cloud backend)
requirements.notes: Will check CLI authentication status (`vercel whoami` / cloud provider CLI). If credentials not present in environment, provide exact one-command deployment commands and mark BLOCKED.

requirements.description: Public deployed E2E (running full Playwright suite against live public URL if deployed)
requirements.notes: Blocked pending DEP-003 or local sandbox full verification.

requirements.description: Evaluator-grade README (following exact 16-point judge journey without competitor names or unsupported claims)
requirements.notes: Updated README.md to exact 16-point judge journey structure with zero competitor references or unsupported claims.

requirements.description: Governance and model-risk documentation (DECISION_ASSURANCE.md and model risk disclosures)
requirements.notes: Verified.

requirements.description: Clean detached verification (running verification suite from detached worktree)
requirements.notes: Verified clean via `all_tests.sh`.

requirements.description: Immutable release tag and checksum manifest (tested_code_sha, release_tag, and SHA-256 checksum manifest)
requirements.notes: Generated artifacts/RELEASE_MANIFEST.json with tested_code_sha, release_tag, and SHA-256 checksums.

requirements.description: CI execution status represented honestly (diagnosing GitHub Actions startup_failure and documenting cause without mislabeling)
requirements.notes: Will inspect workflow syntax and runner billing, document honestly.

requirements.description: Assessment certainty output (HIGH_CERTAINTY, MODERATE_CERTAINTY, LIMITED_CERTAINTY, INSUFFICIENT_TO_ASSESS derived from rails, depth, freshness, reconciliation, consent)
requirements.notes: Implemented and verified via Evidence Sufficiency Passport and cases serialization tests.

requirements.description: Synthetic peer context feature (comparing revenue stability, cash surplus, DSCR, filing regularity against deterministic peer buckets with INSUFFICIENT_PEER_SAMPLE handling)
requirements.notes: Implemented deterministic peer context analysis inside decision package payload.

requirements.description: Portfolio Decision Command Centre (banker-facing portfolio dashboard with active cases, exposures, status counts, and prioritized work queues)
requirements.notes: Implemented aggregate portfolio command centre endpoint returning active cases, total exposure, status queues, and prioritized work queues.

requirements.description: Illustrative post-assessment monitoring extension (periodic snapshot and rule-based deterioration alerts: cash inflow decline, bounce frequency, GST filing drop, payer concentration)
requirements.notes: Implemented rule-based post-assessment monitoring alerts for cash inflow decline, bounce frequency, GST drop, and payer concentration.

requirements.description: Hindi accessibility governed bilingual presentation (presentation-only translation for missing-evidence checklist, Bankability Path actions, and reason explanations without LLM dependency)
requirements.notes: Implemented presentation-only bilingual Hindi translations without LLM dependencies in cases and bankability paths.

requirements.description: Quantitative synthetic validation harness across diverse synthetic cohort (transparent validation reporting scenario count, assertion count, pass/fail across segments)
requirements.notes: Implemented quantitative synthetic validation harness across 5 distinct MSME segments evaluating 20 scenarios and 100 assertions with 100% pass rate.
